## Harness Checklist

- [ ] I made the smallest safe change.
- [ ] I avoided unrelated refactors.
- [ ] I did not edit secrets or `.env*`.
- [ ] I did not weaken tests.
- [ ] I did not add dependencies without justification.
- [ ] I documented risks.
- [ ] I included rollback notes.
